name: renn-labs
description: Renn Labs' Claude Code marketplace — home of Looptimal, the outcome-loop orchestrator that turns an objective into a delivered, verified outcome (and contains the loop-design wizard, formerly LoopPrint).

plugins.name: looptimal
plugins.description: Turns an objective into a delivered, verified outcome — sealed acceptance suite, the right loop, a war-game pass, domain-expert execution (maker != checker), and a separate verifier. Contains the loop-design wizard (formerly LoopPrint) as its Design-loop mode.
